speaker: owner
context: Wiki owner providing personal memories about Alex Chen

entries.content: We got lost trying to find the restaurant and ended up walking through a park. Alex spotted a stray cat and spent ten minutes trying to befriend it while I looked up directions.
At the concert, someone in the row behind us kept singing off-key and Alex couldn't stop laughing. We had to move seats twice.
Alex's roommate Sam and our mutual friend Jordan were also at the concert.
The messages say we met on a Thursday but it was actually a Friday — I remember because I had just finished my last class of the week.
